arts.ttl: Noussair Mazraoui issues warning to Man United team-mates as he makes telling claim
arts.sum: Noussair Mazraoui has been a key figure for Manchester United since joining the club in the summer and is already looking ahead to the future under Ruben Amorim

arts.ttl: Manchester United squad vs Everton confirmed as Ruben Amorim handed injury boost
arts.sum: Man United defender Harry Maguire was among the players to arrive at Old Trafford ahead of the clash with Everton.

arts.ttl: 'Diary filling up' with transfer talks as Liverpool rival Man Utd for Amorim favourite
arts.sum: Liverpool are hoping to rival Manchester United in the race to sign one of Europe’s biggest wonderkids, with ‘the diary filling up’ over transfer talks for the teenage prodigy. One of the players being considered is Geovany Quenda, who broke into Sporting’s team this season playing under Amorim as a right-sided wing back.

arts.ttl: Manchester United “working intensively” on three potential midfield signings
arts.sum: Manchester United are reportedly already working hard on three potential midfield signings as Florian Plettenberg says the club are looking for a 6, 8 and a 10. arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim ready to make hugely risky early transfer decision at Man United
arts.sum: Manchester United’s new manager Ruben Amorim is reportedly ready to take a big gamble by allowing key players to leave, including Marcus Rashford. The Portuguese tactician is seemingly willing to offload any players who don’t fit in to his tactical plans, and a report from Spanish outlet Fichajes names Rashford as one of the biggest […] The post Ruben Amorim ready to make hugely risky early transfer decision at Man United appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Manchester United vs Everton live early team news as squad confirmed, how to watch plus kick-off time
arts.athr: newsdesk@men-news.co.uk (Samuel Luckhurst, George Smith, Steven Railston)
arts.sum: Stay with us for live coverage of Man United's Premier League clash with Everton at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: PSG's secret weapon in transfer race to beat Man Utd to Chelsea star
arts.sum: According to TBR Football, PSG have ‘floated’ the idea to Chelsea that they would be willing to include Randal Kolo Muani in a deal for Nkunku, with the 25-year-old considered surplus to requirements. Paris Saint-Germain could line up a swap deal with Chelsea in order to beat Manchester United in the race to sign Christopher Nkunku in January.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim's nightmare Manchester United consequence comes true
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim's former club Sporting CP hadn't lost a league game at home in over a year

arts.ttl: Why is Man Utd vs Everton not on TV in the UK? How to watch Premier League clash
arts.sum: Manchester United return to Premier League action on Sunday afternoon as they welcome Everton to Old Trafford, but the game won't be broadcast live in the UK
